title: coleus petraeus
intro: Coleus petraeus, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a tropical plant native to India and other parts of Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It contains a key compound called forskolin, which has been found to exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as high blood pressure, asthma, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have health benefits like reducing body fat and improving cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, forskolin is often extracted and sold as a dietary supplement, although it can also be found in some traditional herbal remedies, such as teas and tinctures.
